message:
feat: add audit log for bd dolt config set changes

Appends timestamped entries to .beads/dolt-config.log whenever
dolt server config is changed, recording actor, key, and value.
Helps diagnose mysterious config overwrites like the 10.0.0.1:3309
incident.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
